mapper.select: SELECT sja.*, p.position_type, p.description, p.requirements, p.view_count, p.publish_date, cu.contact_person, cu.contact_phone, cu.contact_email FROM student_job_application sja LEFT JOIN position p ON sja.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN company_users cu ON sja.company_id = cu.id WHERE sja.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sja.create_time DESC

SELECT sja.*, p.position_type, p.description, p.requirements, p.view_count, p.publish_date, cu.contact_person, cu.contact_phone, cu.contact_email FROM student_job_application sja LEFT JOIN position p ON sja.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN company_users cu ON sja.company_id = cu.id WHERE sja.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_job_application (student_id, position_id, company_id, position_name, company_name, location, salary, duration, cover_letter, resume_url, student_name, student_no, phone, email, major, grade, self_introduction, status, apply_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{positionId}, #{companyId}, #{positionName}, #{companyName}, #{location}, #{salary}, #{duration}, #{coverLetter}, #{resumeUrl}, #{studentName}, #{studentNo}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{major}, #{grade}, #{selfIntroduction}, #{status}, #{applyDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE student_job_application SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT sja.*, p.position_type, p.description, p.requirements, p.view_count, p.publish_date, cu.contact_person, cu.contact_phone, cu.contact_email FROM student_job_application sja LEFT JOIN position p ON sja.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN company_users cu ON sja.company_id = cu.id WHERE sja.company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY sja.create_time DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_job_application WHERE student_id = #{studentId}) as applied, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_invitation WHERE student_id = #{studentId}) as interviewInvites, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internship_confirmation_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId}) as confirmedRecords, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internship_reflection WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status != 0) as submittedReflections
